---
name: Translation / i18n Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or untranslated text in any supported locale
title: "i18n(locale): "
labels: i18n
assignees: ""
---

## Locale

<!-- Select the affected locale(s): en, fr, zh, zh-Hant, es, ru, pt, de, ja, ko, tr, vi, pl -->

## Issue Type

- [ ] Missing translation (string falls back to English or is blank)
- [ ] Incorrect / inaccurate translation
- [ ] Wrong terminology (e.g. developer jargon like `LSP`, `Worktree`, `Token` was incorrectly translated)
- [ ] Formatting problem (truncation, wrong pluralization, broken interpolation)
- [ ] Other

## Location

- **Namespace / file:** <!-- e.g. src/i18n/locales/tr/common.json -->
- **Translation key:** <!-- e.g. actions.retry -->
- **Where in the UI:** <!-- e.g. Settings → Key Vault → "Retry" button -->

## Current Text

```
(paste the current translated string here)
```

## Expected Text

```
(paste the correct translation here, or describe what it should say)
```
